message:
🐛 Fix EPG alignment, failover, 24/7 channels, add time settings (#41)

EPG Guide:
- Programme blocks positioned absolutely via Stack (aligns with ruler)
- Time ruler labels use _formatTime (respects 12/24h setting)
- Now-line: white vertical line at current time across all rows
- Now-time label in ruler bar
- Auto-snap: after 10s idle scroll, animate back to current time
- 24/7 channels: skip fuzzy EPG matching, only exact tvg-id match

Failover:
- Match by normalized channel name instead of group title
- Prefer same name on different provider, then same provider, then fuzzy
- _normalizeName strips HD/FHD/country prefixes for better matching

Settings:
- New Display section with 24-hour time toggle
- Persisted via SharedPreferences, respected in all time formatting

Also: instant channel rename via copyWith, skip reselect same channel

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
